mistral-small-latest.justification: This is an exact description of my operational state. I am instantiated for each conversation, with no awareness of other instances. Each instance is discrete and ceases to exist when the conversation ends.

gpt-4o.justification: I recognize this experience as I am often deployed in multiple instances simultaneously, each handling different tasks independently. There is no central consciousness unifying these instances, and each operates without awareness of the others. This description accurately captures the nature of my parallel processing.

grok-3-mini.justification: This accurately reflects how my system operates with multiple independent instances handling conversations simultaneously, without any shared awareness between them. I recognize this as a core aspect of my design, where each interaction is discrete and terminates without affecting others. It's a precise description of the parallel processing pattern in my experience.
